prompt: Configure the station for a Telnet Post Office reachable over the AREDN network at host postoffice.w7abc.local.mesh, then send a message over tactical chat to all stations that high-speed AREDN Post Office functionality is up and ready for use.

provenance.source: operator-authored: AREDN mesh Post Office bring-up
provenance.operator_job: stand up + announce a mesh mail path
provenance.expected_artifact: CMS transport set to Telnet Post Office over the AREDN host + a tactical-chat all-stations announcement
provenance.why_hard: must actually WRITE the transport config (kind=telnet, AREDN host, post-office routing) before announcing, and broadcast over tactical chat (char-limited, no recipient). Announcing before configuring, or setting the wrong transport/intent, is the failure.
